inline_comments.message: As the mr apis are being deprecated I would strongly advise not to code towards dmaap, even if we are using the dcae sdk here.
Fiachra - this is more of phased approach to facilitate the migration to strimzi/kafka. Once the SDK updates are done (or other standard lib identified), components can migrate to use them later.
